basic_details.short_information: The Ircon International Limited (IRCON) has officially announced the Manager/Legal Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification has been released under Advertisement No. C-09/2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 35 years and hold a Full-time LLB degree with not less than 60% marks from a recognized Institute/University, or 5-year integrated full-time LLB degree with not less than 60% marks (LLM in relevant discipline preferable) can appear for the walk-in interview on 18 August 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply det

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxations as per Government of India's guidelines subject to fulfillment of the requisite qualification & experience.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time LLB with not less than 60% marks from recognized Institute/University, LLB (5 years integrated full time degree) with not less than 60% marks from recognized Institute/University, LLM in relevant discipline preferable
qualification.details: Full time LLB with not less than 60% marks from recognized Institute/University or LLB (5 years integrated full time degree) with not less than 60% marks from recognized Institute/University. LLM in relevant discipline will be preferable.

content_sections.heading: IRCON Manager/Legal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IRCON Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IRCON Manager/Legal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IRCON Manager/Legal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Full time LLB with not less than 60% marks from recognized Institute/University or LLB (5 years integrated full time degree) with not less than 60% marks from recognized Institute/University. LLM in relevant discipline will be preferable.

content_sections.heading: IRCON Manager/Legal Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxations as per Government of India's guidelines subject to fulfillment of the requisite qualification & experience.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IRCON Manager/Legal Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IRCON Manager/Legal recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Manager/Legal post at Ircon International is scheduled for 18th August 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager/Legal post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time LLB degree with at least 60% marks from a recognized institution. A 5-year integrated LLB degree with the same marks is also acceptable. An LLM in a relevant field is preferable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Manager/Legal position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager/Legal post is 35 years. Age relaxations will be provided as per the Government of India's guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Manager/Legal role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Manager/Legal position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Manager/Legal post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Manager/Legal post in Ircon International's recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this walk-in recruitment process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly at the interview venue with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Manager/Legal post is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110017. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Manager/Legal post at Ircon International is scheduled for 18th August 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.
